diagnoses.evidence: Dashboard run-state shows EXT-KASPA-006 sent 1.46549257 KAS from Account #1 to Account #2, then failed in history validation with detail text starting "接收 17:17 • Wallet 2 / Account #2 +1.4655 KAS" and missing field "type". CDP DOM inspection after the run showed history rows containing both send and receive records; the failed row was a receive record with the same rounded amount, so the pre-click matcher accepted token+amount without requiring send direction.
diagnoses.recommendation: Restore the pre-click send-direction guard in verifyHistoryRecord(): latestHistoryMatchesExpected() should require the latest row to contain 发送/發送/Send when validating outgoing transfer history, before counting it as a stable match and clicking it.

suggestedFix.action: Add a send-type predicate to latestHistoryMatchesExpected() or pass expected historyType='send'; keep amount rounding logic, but require token + rounded amount + send label before clicking the latest row.
